articles.title: Wish Upon a Jirachi in Pokémon Pokopia
articles.description: Join the Wish Upon a Jirachi event from June 23 to July 8, 2026, and help make Pokémon dreams come true. Befriend Jirachi and enjoy the festivities!
articles.impact: Pokémon fans can enjoy a special event.

articles.title: Round Up: The Reviews Are In For The Adventures Of Elliot: The Millenium Tales
articles.description: Critics have shared their reviews for Square Enix's new HD-2D title, The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales. Check out the highlights and feedback from various sources.
articles.impact: The game receives mixed reviews from critics.

articles.title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
articles.description: Learn how to disable the intrusive 'write with Gemini' pop-ups in Google Docs. Follow these simple steps to regain control over your writing experience.
articles.impact: Users can customize their Google Docs experience.

articles.title: Yakuza Creator's Gang of Dragon PS5 Game Really Does Seem Dead
articles.description: Evidence suggests that the Yakuza creator's new game, Gang of Dragon, may be canceled. Fans are left wondering about the future of this anticipated title.
articles.impact: Fans may not see this game released.

articles.title: Everything you need to know from State of Unreal 2026
articles.description: Unreal Engine 6 and 5.8 were unveiled at the State of Unreal keynote. Key highlights include significant updates and a $1 billion payout to UEFN developers.
articles.impact: Developers gain access to powerful new tools.

articles.title: Street Fighter 6 DLC character Yasmine launches August 3
articles.description: Capcom announced that Yasmine, a new character for Street Fighter 6, will be available on August 3. Get ready for exciting new gameplay options!

articles.title: Pixel Screenshots no longer exclusively uses on-device AI
articles.description: Pixel Screenshots now utilizes cloud processing alongside on-device AI. This update enhances performance and capabilities for users.
articles.impact: Users benefit from improved screenshot capabilities.

articles.title: ALS Patient Gains Ability to Speak Using Experimental Brain-Computer Interface
articles.description: A groundbreaking brain-computer interface developed at UC Davis allows an ALS patient to communicate and work full-time. This innovation offers hope for many.
articles.impact: This technology transforms lives for ALS patients.

articles.title: Is the Trump T1 Just an HTC Phone Painted Gold?
articles.description: CNET's review suggests the Trump phone is a rebranded HTC U24 Pro. The findings raise questions about its originality and value.
articles.impact: Consumers may reconsider purchasing this phone.

articles.title: OnePlus just launched an unexpected upgrade to its best flagship killer phone
articles.description: OnePlus has unveiled an unexpected upgrade to its flagship killer phone, enhancing performance and features. Details on the new model are now available.

articles.title: Apple’s new software drops support for these 16 products
articles.description: Apple's latest software update drops support for 16 products, including older iPads and Macs. Users should check compatibility before upgrading.
articles.impact: Users may need to upgrade their devices.

articles.title: Epic Games CEO Tim Sweeney calls for Team Open to address game industry’s challenges
articles.description: Tim Sweeney urges the gaming industry to unite and tackle challenges posed by competitors like Roblox. His call for collaboration aims to strengthen the sector.
articles.impact: Collaboration could reshape the gaming landscape.

articles.title: Rockstar Announces Free PS5 And Xbox Series X/S Upgrade For Grand Theft Auto V
articles.description: Rockstar Games will offer free upgrades for GTA V owners on last-gen consoles to current-gen versions. This move excites fans awaiting GTA VI.
articles.impact: Fans can enjoy enhanced gameplay for free.

articles.title: Dispatch just got a Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch update to reduce censorship
articles.description: AdHoc Studio released a new update for Dispatch on Nintendo Switch 2, addressing censorship issues. The patch is now available for download.
articles.impact: Players can enjoy a more open experience.

articles.title: The chaos continues
articles.description: Minecraft kicks off summer with community challenges, multiplayer experiences, and a Marketplace Summer Sale. Join the fun and explore new features!
articles.impact: Players can engage in exciting summer activities.
